```
> INCOMING SIGNAL
```

## Type

- [ ] Transmission (new dispatch)
- [ ] Research (paper, dataset, or result)
- [ ] Documentation (correction, clarification, expansion)
- [ ] Counter-signal (challenge to existing content)

## Summary

<!-- What are you contributing and why does it matter? Keep it brief. -->


## Signal quality check

- [ ] This adds information that wasn't already present
- [ ] Claims are supported by evidence or clearly marked as speculation
- [ ] I've been honest about what I don't know
- [ ] I've read the [contributing guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)
